description.name: GST Manager
description.tagline: Manage GST invoicing and compliance for your WHMCS business with automated tax calculations.
description.long:
GST Manager for WHMCS is a module that allows your business to automatically handle GST (Goods and Services Tax) invoicing and compliance. The module streamlines tax calculations, generates GST-compliant invoices, and maintains detailed records for audit purposes.

Key features include automatic GST rate application based on customer location, GST-compliant invoice formatting, tax report generation, and comprehensive audit trails. The module supports multiple tax rates and can be customized for different jurisdictions.
